zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Klingham於1494年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭波克夏提勒爾斯特時，她的父親John Klingman19歲，母親Joan Giffard22歲。她於1517年與John Bushnell Sr在英國英格蘭波克夏提勒爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1585年10月1日在她的家鄉享年91歲，埋葬在英國波克夏提勒爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Klingham于1494年1月1日出生在英国英格兰波克夏提勒爾斯特时，她的父亲John Klingman19岁，母亲Joan Giffard22岁。她于1517年与John Bushnell Sr在英国英格兰波克夏提勒爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1585年10月1日在她的家乡享年91岁，埋葬在英国波克夏提勒爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Klingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Kingham in Oxfordshire or Keyingham in East Yorkshire, named in Old English from the personal name Cǣga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Klingham was born on 1 January 1494, in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Klingman, was 19 and her mother, Joan Giffard, was 22. She married John Bushnell Sr in 1517, in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 October 1585, in her hometown, at the age of 91, and was buried in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Klingham est née le 1 janvier 1494, à Tilehurst, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Klingman, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan Giffard, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Bushnell Sr en 1517, à Tilehurst, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 octobre 1585, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Tilehurst, Berkshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1517 in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom John Bushnell Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Oktober 1585 im Alter von 91 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Klingham è nata il il 1 gennaio 1494 nel Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Klingman, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Joan Giffard, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Bushnell Sr nel 1517, nel Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 ottobre 1585, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a Tilehurst, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Klinghamが1494年1月1日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアティレハルストで生まれた時，父John Klingmanは19歳，母Joan Giffardは22歳であった。1517年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアティレハルストでJohn Bushnell Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1585年10月1日に故郷で91歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアティレハルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Klingham(이)가 1494년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 틸후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Klingman(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Giffard(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 틸후르스트에서 John Bushnell Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1585년 10월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 틸후르스트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Klingham родилась 1 января 1494 г. в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Klingman было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Giffard, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bushnell Sr в 1517 г. в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 октября 1585 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия.
